zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Munning於1408年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯維安波爾斯時，他的父親Anthony Munning22歲，母親Lady Munning26歲。他於1428年與Elizabeth Charles在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1462年12月19日在英國英格蘭素福爾可內吉享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可諾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Munning于1408年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯維安波爾斯时，他的父亲Anthony Munning22岁，母亲Lady Munning26岁。他于1428年与Elizabeth Charles在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1462年12月19日在英国英格兰素福爾可內吉享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可諾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Munning
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Munding (Old English * Munding, a derivative of names in Mund- or -mund).

variants.name: Munnings
meanings: English (Suffolk): variant of Munning, with post-medieval excrescent -s. Munning is from the Middle English personal name Munding (Old English Munding, a derivative of names in Mund- or -mund). This form of the surname is the more common one in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Munning was born in 1408, in Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, his father, Anthony Munning, was 22 and his mother, Lady Munning, was 26. He married Elizabeth Charles in 1428, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 19 December 1462, in Nedging, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Norton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Munning est né en 1408, à Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Anthony Munning, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Munning, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Charles en 1428, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 décembre 1462, à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Norton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Munning 1408 in Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anthony Munning 22 und seine Mutter Lady Munning 26. Er hat 1428 in England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Charles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Dezember 1462 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Nedging, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Norton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Munning è nato il nel 1408 nel Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, il suo padre, Anthony Munning, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Lady Munning, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Charles nel 1428, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 dicembre 1462, nel Nedging, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Norton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Munningが1408年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンポイティエルズで生まれた時，父Anthony Munningは22歳，母Lady Munningは26歳であった。1428年にイギリスイギリスでElizabeth Charlesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1462年12月19日にイギリスイギリススフォルクネドジングで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクノートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Munning(이)가 1408년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 포이티어스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anthony Munning(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Munning(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1428년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth Charles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1462년 12월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 네지잉에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 노르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Munning nasceu em 1408, em Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Anthony Munning, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Munning, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Charles em 1428, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de dezembro de 1462, em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Norton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Munning родился в 1408 г. в местности поитиирс, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Anthony Munning было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Munning, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Charles в 1428 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 19 декабря 1462 г. в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности нортон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Munning nació en 1408, en Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Anthony Munning, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lady Munning, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Charles en 1428, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de diciembre de 1462, en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Norton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
